common.fileSizeError: File size must be less than {size}MB.

home.title: Media Utility
home.subtitle: Browser-based media conversion tools
home.description: Convert images, videos, and GIFs in your browser. Files are not sent to servers.
home.privacyDesc: All files are processed only in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to servers.
home.speedDesc: WebAssembly technology provides near-native processing speed.
home.freeDesc: Use all features for free with no file limits.
home.ctaDesc: Use directly in your browser without signup or installation.

imageConverter.title: Image Converter
imageConverter.description: Convert various image formats including PNG, JPG, WebP, HEIC

features.heicDesc: Easily convert HEIC files from iPhone to JPG or PNG.
features.qualityDesc: Adjust image quality from 1-100% to balance file size and quality.
features.batchDesc: Upload multiple images and convert them all with the same settings.
features.webpDesc: Convert to modern WebP format to optimize website performance.

howToUse.title: Image Format Converter
howToUse.description: Easily convert various image formats including PNG, JPG, WebP, HEIC. All processing is done in your browser for privacy.
howToUse.step1Desc: Drag or click to select image files to convert. You can upload multiple files at once.
howToUse.step2Desc: Choose the output format (JPG, PNG, WebP) and image quality.
howToUse.step3Desc: Click convert and download individually or all at once when complete.

constraints: Up to 20 files, max 50MB each
Input: HEIC, SVG, PSD, RAW and more
Output: JPG, PNG, WebP

faq.a1: HEIC is a high-efficiency image format used by Apple since iOS 11. It has smaller file sizes than JPG with the same quality.
faq.q2: How should I choose quality settings?
faq.a2: For web images, 70-80% is recommended. For printing or preserving originals, use 90-100%.
faq.a3: Maximum 100MB per file, up to 10 files at once.

imageEditor.title: Image Editor
imageEditor.description: Crop, rotate, flip, resize, optimize, and adjust brightness of images
constraints: One image at a time
Browser memory-based processing

howToUse.title: Image Editor
howToUse.description: A free online image editor supporting crop, rotate, flip, resize, optimize, and brightness adjustment. All processing is done in your browser.
howToUse.step1Desc: Drag or click to select an image file to edit.
howToUse.step2Desc: Use the toolbar to crop, rotate, flip, resize, optimize, or adjust brightness of your image.
howToUse.step3Desc: When done editing, download the result image.

gifMaker.title: GIF Maker
gifMaker.description: Combine multiple images to create animated GIFs
constraints: Image files only
Memory usage increases with frame count

howToUse.title: GIF Maker
howToUse.description: Create animated GIFs from multiple images. Easily make GIF animations with adjustable speed and size.
howToUse.step1Desc: Add images in sequence to create an animation. Drag to reorder.
howToUse.step2Desc: Set frame delay (speed) and output size.
howToUse.step3Desc: Click create and download your animated GIF.

videoConverter.title: Video Converter
videoConverter.description: Convert video to GIF, GIF to MP4, extract frames
constraints: FFmpeg WASM (~30MB) downloaded on first use
Large files may be limited by browser memory

howToUse.title: Video Converter
howToUse.description: Convert videos to GIF, GIF to MP4 video, or extract frames from videos. All processing is done in your browser using FFmpeg WebAssembly.
howToUse.step1Desc: Choose Video to GIF, GIF to Video, or Extract Frames.
howToUse.step2Desc: Upload a video or GIF file to convert.
howToUse.step3Desc: Adjust FPS, scale, format, then convert and download.

videoFormatConverter.title: Video Format Converter
videoFormatConverter.description: Convert video formats between MP4, WebM, MOV, and AVI
videoFormatConverter.sharedArrayBufferError: Your browser does not support SharedArrayBuffer. Please use a modern browser or access via HTTPS.
constraints: FFmpeg WASM (~30MB) downloaded on first use
Large files may be limited by browser memory

howToUse.title: Video Format Converter
howToUse.description: Convert between various video formats including MP4, WebM, MOV, and AVI. All processing is done in your browser using FFmpeg WebAssembly.
howToUse.step1Desc: Drag or click to upload the video file you want to convert.
howToUse.step2Desc: Choose your desired output format: MP4, WebM, MOV, or AVI.
howToUse.step3Desc: Click the convert button to process and download the result.

videoResizer.title: Video Resizer
videoResizer.sharedArrayBufferError: Your browser does not support SharedArrayBuffer. Please use a modern browser or access via HTTPS.
constraints: FFmpeg WASM (~30MB) downloaded on first use
Large files may be limited by browser memory

howToUse.title: Video Resizer
howToUse.description: Change video resolution to any size you need. Supports presets and custom dimensions with aspect ratio lock.
howToUse.step1Desc: Drag or click to upload the video file you want to resize.
howToUse.step2Desc: Choose a preset (4K, 1080p, 720p, etc.) or enter custom dimensions.
howToUse.step3Desc: Click the resize button to process and download the result.

backgroundRemover.title: Background Remover
backgroundRemover.description: Automatically remove image backgrounds using AI
constraints: Up to 5 files, max 10MB each
AI model (~30MB) downloaded on first use
Complex backgrounds may affect accuracy
backgroundRemover.aiNoticeDesc: The AI model (~30MB) will be downloaded on first use. All processing is done in your browser for complete privacy.

features.aiDesc: Deep learning AI model automatically detects objects and precisely removes backgrounds.
features.privacyDesc: All processing is done in your browser. Images are never uploaded to external servers.
features.transparentDesc: Saves as transparent PNG files ready for various uses.
features.batchDesc: Upload multiple images and automatically remove backgrounds from all at once.

howToUse.title: AI Background Removal Tool
howToUse.description: Automatically remove backgrounds from images using AI technology. All processing is done in your browser for complete privacy.
howToUse.step1Desc: Select images to remove backgrounds from. You can upload multiple files at once.
howToUse.step2Desc: Click process and AI will automatically detect objects and remove backgrounds.
howToUse.step3Desc: Download the completed transparent PNG files.

faq.q1: What types of images work best?
faq.a1: Most effective for images with clear subjects like people, products, or animals. Complex backgrounds or transparent objects may vary in results.
faq.q2: Why is the first run slow?
faq.a2: The AI model (about 30MB) is downloaded on first use. After that, it's cached in your browser for fast processing.
faq.a3: For optimal performance, we recommend maximum 10MB per file and up to 5 files at once.

urlGenerator.title: URL Generator

types.base64Desc: Embed directly in HTML/CSS. Works without a server.
types.blobDesc: Temporary URL valid only in this browser session.
types.r2Desc: Upload to cloud storage for a permanent shareable link.

result.title: Generated URL
result.warning: Blob URLs are only valid in this browser session.

constraints: Data URL is ~133% of original file size
Blob URL or cloud storage recommended for large files

howToUse.title: URL Generator
howToUse.description: Convert images and videos to shareable URLs. Choose Base64 for embedding, Blob for temporary use, or Cloud for permanent sharing.
howToUse.step1Desc: Upload an image or video file to generate a URL.
howToUse.step2Desc: Choose Base64, Blob, or Cloud Storage based on your needs.
howToUse.step3Desc: Generate the URL and copy it for use in HTML, CSS, or sharing.

imageCompressor.title: Image Compressor
imageCompressor.description: Reduce image file size for web optimization and save storage space

features.qualityDesc: Adjust compression quality from 10-100% to balance file size and image quality.
features.maxSizeDesc: Specify a maximum file size in MB and images will be automatically compressed to fit.
features.batchDesc: Upload up to 20 images and compress them all with the same settings.
features.privacyDesc: All compression is done in your browser. Images are never uploaded to servers.

howToUse.title: Image Compression Tool
howToUse.description: Reduce image file sizes to improve website loading speed and save storage space. All processing is done in your browser.
howToUse.step1Desc: Drag or click to select images to compress. You can upload up to 20 files at once.
howToUse.step2Desc: Adjust the quality slider or set a target file size.
howToUse.step3Desc: Click compress and download individually or all at once when complete.

constraints: Up to 20 files, max 50MB each
Supported formats: JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF

faq.a1: JPG, PNG, WebP, and GIF formats are supported. Compressed files are saved in the same format as the original.
faq.q2: How should I choose compression level?
faq.a2: For web images, 60-80% is recommended. For quality preservation, use 85-95%. Lower values produce smaller files.
faq.q3: Does it modify the original image?
faq.a3: No. The original file is not changed. A new compressed file is created separately.

watermark.title: Watermark
watermark.description: Add text or image watermarks to protect your copyright

features.textDesc: Add customizable text watermarks with adjustable font, size, color, and rotation.
features.imageDesc: Use logos or images as watermarks to display your brand identity.
features.tileDesc: Apply watermarks as a repeating pattern across the entire image for strong protection.
features.batchDesc: Apply the same watermark to multiple images at once.

constraints: Up to 20 files, max 50MB each

howToUse.title: Watermark Tool
howToUse.description: Add text or image watermarks to protect your copyright. All processing is done in your browser.
howToUse.step1Desc: Drag or click to select images to watermark.
howToUse.step2Desc: Choose text or image watermark and set position, opacity, size, and more.
howToUse.step3Desc: Click apply and download when complete.

memeGenerator.title: Meme Generator
memeGenerator.description: Add funny meme text to your images
constraints: One image at a time
Max 50MB per file

howToUse.title: Meme Generator
howToUse.description: Add meme text to images to create fun content. See results instantly with live preview.
howToUse.step1Desc: Upload an image to turn into a meme.
howToUse.step2Desc: Enter top/bottom text and customize font, size, and colors.
howToUse.step3Desc: Click generate and download your completed meme.

faceBlur.title: Face Blur
faceBlur.description: Auto-detect faces with AI and apply blur/mosaic for privacy protection
constraints: Up to 10 files, max 50MB each
AI model downloaded on first use
Face detection accuracy is not 100%
faceBlur.aiNoticeDesc: The AI model will be downloaded on first use. All processing is done in your browser for complete privacy.

features.autoDesc: AI automatically detects faces in images and marks their locations.
features.blurDesc: Smooth gaussian blur for natural face blurring.
features.mosaicDesc: Pixelated mosaic effect for face concealment.
features.batchDesc: Detect and blur faces in multiple images at once.

howToUse.title: Face Blur Tool
howToUse.description: Auto-detect and blur faces using AI. All processing is done in your browser for privacy.
howToUse.step2Desc: Click detect and AI will automatically find faces.
howToUse.step3Desc: Choose blur type and intensity, apply, then download.

htmlToImage.title: HTML to Image

features.codeDesc: Enter HTML and CSS code directly to convert to images.
features.previewDesc: See real-time preview of your code output.
features.formatDesc: Export as PNG, JPG, or SVG format.
features.sizeDesc: Set custom width and height for the output image.

constraints: External resources (images, fonts) subject to CORS restrictions
Max resolution: 4000×4000px

howToUse.title: HTML to Image Converter
howToUse.description: Enter HTML/CSS code and convert to images. Create banners, cards, and social images from code.
howToUse.step1Desc: Enter HTML and CSS in the editor tabs.
howToUse.step2Desc: Set output size, format, and background color.
howToUse.step3Desc: Click convert and download the result image.

howToUse.privacyNotice: All files are processed in your browser and are not uploaded to servers. Your privacy is fully protected.

imageUpscaler.title: Image Upscaler
imageUpscaler.description: Upscale low-resolution images to high-resolution using AI models.
constraints: Up to 5 files, max 20MB each
AI model (~80MB) downloaded on first use
Desktop browser recommended
Large images may take longer to process
imageUpscaler.desktopNoticeDesc: AI upscaling requires significant computing resources. Best performance on desktop browsers.

howToUse.title: How to Use Image Upscaler
howToUse.description: Enhance image resolution using AI-powered super-resolution technology.
howToUse.step1Desc: Select the image file to upscale.
howToUse.step2Desc: Choose 2x, 3x, or 4x scale and output format.
howToUse.step3Desc: AI analyzes and upscales the image to high resolution.

features.compareDesc: Compare original and upscaled results with slider
features.formatDesc: Support PNG, JPG, WebP output formats

footer.privacyNote: Convert files safely in your browser. Nothing is uploaded to servers.
